title: Mobile-first responsive layout + installable offline PWA shell
when: App should feel native on phones and/or work offline / be installable
principle: Design mobile-first (base styles for small screens, enhance up with min-width media queries); touch targets >=44px; use a manifest.json for install metadata and a service worker that caches the app shell for offline. Respect safe-area insets. Keep it self-contained (no CDN) so offline truly works.
pitfalls: Desktop-first CSS retrofitted to mobile, tap targets too small, service worker caching a CDN URL (breaks offline), forgetting the viewport meta.
